inputs.label: Annual Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue from sales. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to production. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: SG&A, R&D, depreciation. Based on income statement.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Threshold >0.05 triggers critical warning.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework a defective unit. Lean manufacturing waste reduction.

inputs.label: Units Produced Annually
inputs.businessContext: Total production volume. Used to scale defect costs.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual holding cost as % of inventory value. APICS standard: 20-30%.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average value of inventory held. Used for carrying cost calculation.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty.

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'High defect rate causing significant rework cost' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate' : ''
inventoryHoldingCostRate > 0.3 ? 'Review inventory management; consider JIT or lean practices' : ''
erosionRatio > 0.1 ? 'Conduct value stream mapping to identify waste' : ''
